TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Song Elizabeth ising == Song Elizabeth ising (Inkiris: Elizabeth Blackburn Ferguson, 1868 miheca, 4 folad 3 romi'ad-1901 miheca 1 folad 17 romi'ad ), roma Elizabeth Blackburn Christie, Elizabeth Christie, Christie, Song moksuniw , Elizabeth ising, Song Congcian moksuniw , Elizabeth , Song Eli , o cecay nai Glasgow, Scotland a ising. Halafin cingra i timolay Taywan a malaising ato singkiwsi a tayal. Kasofocan 'Ayaway 'orip O kasofocan ni Song Elizabeth (Elizabeth Blackburn Christie) i Glasgow no Scotland. O mama ningra ci John Christie, o nao padamaay to ising, ikor mala nisilsilay to sapaiyo; o ina ningra ci Anne Margaret McAra Soutar; o sakakaay a wawa to fafahiyan ci Elizabeth, tatolo ko safa to fa'inayan, ikor nangra saheto o malaisingay. I kaemangan limaay ho komihecaan ni Christie misitapangay to mafana' to tilid a misa'osi. I 19 ko miheca i, micomoday to isingan minanam to 5 miheca. 24 ko mihecaan i, misawad maala ningra ko toloay (laloma'ay, papotalay, sapaiyo) kasasiiked no isingan a fana' (sakamoko' han ko tilid, L.R.C.P. & S., Ed.). I 1891 miheca, tayni Taywan ci Christie i minanam to sowal no Taywan; ikor, masaso'araw cingra aci Song Congcian itira i Hongkong 1892 miheca 1 folad 9 romi'ad mararamod . Isingan a tayal. Ikor no kararamod, midefong cangra mararamod to isingan ato pisinting a tayal i Taynan saniyaro' ko pidotocan. I 1893 miheca 6 folad 4 romi'ad, masofoc cingra i Ryukyuyu to wawa to fafahiyan, paka ci Hazel Lombay Ferguson han ko pangangan. I 1894 miheca 10 folad 11 romi'ad, masofoc cingra to saka 2 a wawa fa'inayan ci Ian Grant Ferguson, ikor mitahidang cangra to midipotay to wawa a ina, padoedo tayra i kasaniyaro' ko isingan no pisinting a tayal. Itiyaay ho, o satadamaanay a fafahiyan isingan cingra, 'aloman ko niyaro'ay a fafahiyan mananam to pinengneng paising ningra; nika, o sapinengneng ningra saheto nai kiwkayay a sacoker a caay pali'acaen ko pipaising ano eca padafohay. I 1896 miheca, madenga cingra to mangalefay salifong adada, saka malahakelong to fa'inay minokay i niyaro' paising, saan masofoc t Osaka 3 wawa to fa'inayan ci Graeme Douglas Ferguson. I 1898 miheca, malahakelong haca ato wawa a tayni i Taywan. Naitiya, misarocod to ko tayal ningra to isingan a demak, masaromi'ad salafii ko picada to adadaay ato pasofocay ina, nanoyaan mararid ko pisaliway to kaen; itiya i, o Inkiris fafahiyan sinkiwsi yofayof to mihecaan padamso to payso sapadang to 'aca no sapaiyo cingraan, misahalaka mikilim to payso patado sapipatireng to no fafahiyan a isingan . Mapatay I 1900 miheca 12 folad, ira ko cecay o tatayra i Muca (Neimen no Takao) malaliyaw haca ko kadengaan no adada. Minokay tayni i Taynan fosya i, caay ka nga'ay k okakomaen a maota'ay, tadacaay to ko tatirengan a malotay. Ikor, pakayni pinengneng no ising ci An ising no Sinlaw isingan ato ni Tsukuyama Kuichi ising i, hato caay ka fangcal a manga'ay. I 1901 miheca 1 folad 17 romi'ad, itira i Sinlaw isingan mapatay cingra, 33 ko mihecaan itini hekal. I 1 folad 19 romi'ad, o polong no Sinlaw isingan ato Ciwlokiw congsie pitilidan mipadongos a lihay i cingraan, ikor matadem i Taynan fosya Gongchenmen a mitadem; toya romi'ad, o 'alomanay finawlan miraod tayra mita'ong padongos tangoor cingraan . Ikoray demak Maherek mitadem to fafahi ningra ci Song Congcian foksi i, panokayen ningra i mato'asay no fafahi ko wawa mapolong saka, manga'ay padoedo matayal to pisinting i Taywan . Piheratengan I 2015 miheca, paherek ko patireng to Madou Sinlaw isingan i, laloma' no isingan a pilihayan mapangangan to "Piheratengan ci Song Elizabeth ising a pilihayan" . Pinengnengan to tilid 2. . www.laijohn.com. (2017-10-25). (原始內容存檔於2017-10-25).
S.PHON: == so~uŋ əɾi*ab~b~vətħ isiŋ == so~uŋ əɾi*ab~b~vətħ isiŋ (inkiris: əɾi*ab~b~vətħ b~b~vɾaʦkb~b~vo~u~urn fər*o~u~uso~un, **** miħəʦa, * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ-**** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ), ro~uma əɾi*ab~b~vətħ b~b~vɾaʦkb~b~vo~u~urn ʦħristiə, əɾi*ab~b~vətħ ʦħristiə, ʦħristiə, so~uŋ mo~ukso~u~uniw , əɾi*ab~b~vətħ isiŋ, so~uŋ ʦo~uŋʦian mo~ukso~u~uniw , əɾi*ab~b~vətħ , so~uŋ əɾi , o~u ʦəʦaj nai *ɾas*o~uw, sʦo~utɾanɬ~ɮ a isiŋ. ħaɾafin ʦiŋra i timo~uɾaj tajwan a maɾaisiŋ ato~u siŋkiwsi a tajaɾ. kaso~ufo~uʦan ʡajawaj ʡo~urip o~u kaso~ufo~uʦan ni so~uŋ əɾi*ab~b~vətħ (əɾi*ab~b~vətħ b~b~vɾaʦkb~b~vo~u~urn ʦħristiə) i *ɾas*o~uw no~u sʦo~utɾanɬ~ɮ. o~u mama niŋra ʦi *o~uħn ʦħristiə, o~u nao~u paɬ~ɮamaaj to~u isiŋ, iko~ur maɾa nisiɾsiɾaj to~u sapaijo~u; o~u ina niŋra ʦi annə mar*arət mʦara so~uo~u~utar; o~u sakakaaj a wawa to~u fafaħijan ʦi əɾi*ab~b~vətħ, tato~uɾo~u ko~u safa to~u faʡinajan, iko~ur naŋra saħəto~u o~u maɾaisiŋaj. i kaəmaŋan ɾimaaj ħo~u ko~umiħəʦaan ni ʦħristiə misitapaŋaj to~u mafanaʡ to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ a misaʡo~usi. i ** ko~u miħəʦa i, miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮaj to~u isiŋan minanam to~u * miħəʦa. ** ko~u miħəʦaan i, misawaɬ~ɮ maaɾa niŋra ko~u to~uɾo~uaj (ɾaɾo~umaʡaj, papo~utaɾaj, sapaijo~u) kasasiikəɬ~ɮ no~u isiŋan a fanaʡ (sakamo~uko~uʡ ħan ko~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ, ɾ.r.ʦ.p. & s., əɬ~ɮ.). i **** miħəʦa, tajni tajwan ʦi ʦħristiə i minanam to~u so~uwaɾ no~u tajwan; iko~ur, masaso~uʡaraw ʦiŋra aʦi so~uŋ ʦo~uŋʦian itira i ħo~uŋko~uŋ **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ mararamo~uɬ~ɮ . isiŋan a tajaɾ. iko~ur no~u kararamo~uɬ~ɮ, miɬ~ɮəfo~uŋ ʦaŋra mararamo~uɬ~ɮ to~u isiŋan ato~u pisintiŋ a tajaɾ i tajnan sanijaro~uʡ ko~u piɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦan. i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, maso~ufo~uʦ ʦiŋra i rjo~u~ukjo~u~ujo~u~u to~u wawa to~u fafaħijan, paka ʦi ħa*əɾ ɾo~umb~b~vaj fər*o~u~uso~un ħan ko~u paŋaŋan. i **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, maso~ufo~uʦ ʦiŋra to~u saka * a wawa faʡinajan ʦi ian *rant fər*o~u~uso~un, iko~ur mitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ ʦaŋra to~u miɬ~ɮipo~utaj to~u wawa a ina, paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u tajra i kasanijaro~uʡ ko~u isiŋan no~u pisintiŋ a tajaɾ. itijaaj ħo~u, o~u sataɬ~ɮamaanaj a fafaħijan isiŋan ʦiŋra, ʡaɾo~uman ko~u nijaro~uʡaj a fafaħijan mananam to~u pinəŋnəŋ paisiŋ niŋra; nika, o~u sapinəŋnəŋ niŋra saħəto~u nai kiwkajaj a saʦo~ukər a ʦaaj paɾiʡaʦaən ko~u pipaisiŋ ano~u əʦa paɬ~ɮafo~uħaj. i **** miħəʦa, maɬ~ɮəŋa ʦiŋra to~u maŋaɾəfaj saɾifo~uŋ aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa, saka maɾaħakəɾo~uŋ to~u faʡinaj mino~ukaj i nijaro~uʡ paisiŋ, saan maso~ufo~uʦ t o~usaka * wawa to~u faʡinajan ʦi *raəmə ɬ~ɮo~uo~u~u*ɾas fər*o~u~uso~un. i **** miħəʦa, maɾaħakəɾo~uŋ ħaʦa ato~u wawa a tajni i tajwan. naitija, misaro~uʦo~uɬ~ɮ to~u ko~u tajaɾ niŋra to~u isiŋan a ɬ~ɮəmak, masaro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ saɾafii ko~u piʦaɬ~ɮa to~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj ato~u paso~ufo~uʦaj ina, nano~ujaan marariɬ~ɮ ko~u pisaɾiwaj to~u kaən; itija i, o~u inkiris fafaħijan sinkiwsi jo~ufajo~uf to~u miħəʦaan paɬ~ɮamso~u to~u pajso~u sapaɬ~ɮaŋ to~u ʡaʦa no~u sapaijo~u ʦiŋraan, misaħaɾaka mikiɾim to~u pajso~u pataɬ~ɮo~u sapipatirəŋ to~u no~u fafaħijan a isiŋan . mapataj i **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, ira ko~u ʦəʦaj o~u tatajra i mo~u~uʦa (nəimən no~u takao~u) maɾaɾijaw ħaʦa ko~u kaɬ~ɮəŋaan no~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa. mino~ukaj tajni i tajnan fo~usja i, ʦaaj ka ŋaʡaj k o~ukako~umaən a mao~utaʡaj, taɬ~ɮaʦaaj to~u ko~u tatirəŋan a maɾo~utaj. iko~ur, pakajni pinəŋnəŋ no~u isiŋ ʦi an isiŋ no~u sinɾaw isiŋan ato~u ni tso~u~uko~u~ujama ko~u~uiʦħi isiŋ i, ħato~u ʦaaj ka faŋʦaɾ a maŋaʡaj. i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, itira i sinɾaw isiŋan mapataj ʦiŋra, ** ko~u miħəʦaan itini ħəkaɾ. i * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, o~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u sinɾaw isiŋan ato~u ʦiwɾo~ukiw ʦo~uŋsiə pitiɾiɬ~ɮan mipaɬ~ɮo~uŋo~us a ɾiħaj i ʦiŋraan, iko~ur mataɬ~ɮəm i tajnan fo~usja *o~uŋʦħənmən a mitaɬ~ɮəm; to~uja ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, o~u ʡaɾo~umanaj finawɾan mirao~uɬ~ɮ tajra mitaʡo~uŋ paɬ~ɮo~uŋo~us taŋo~uo~ur ʦiŋraan . iko~uraj ɬ~ɮəmak maħərək mitaɬ~ɮəm to~u fafaħi niŋra ʦi so~uŋ ʦo~uŋʦian fo~uksi i, pano~ukajən niŋra i mato~uʡasaj no~u fafaħi ko~u wawa mapo~uɾo~uŋ saka, maŋaʡaj paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u matajaɾ to~u pisintiŋ i tajwan . piħəratəŋan i **** miħəʦa, paħərək ko~u patirəŋ to~u maɬ~ɮo~uo~u~u sinɾaw isiŋan i, ɾaɾo~umaʡ no~u isiŋan a piɾiħajan mapaŋaŋan to~u "piħəratəŋan ʦi so~uŋ əɾi*ab~b~vətħ isiŋ a piɾiħajan" . pinəŋnəŋan to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ *. . www.ɾaijo~uħn.ʦo~um. (****-**-**). (***********-**-**).
S.FORM: == Song Elizabeth ising == Song Elizabeth ising (Inkiris: Elizabeth Blackburn Ferguson, 1868 miheca, 4 folad 3 romi'ad-1901 miheca 1 folad 17 romi'ad ), roma Elizabeth Blackburn Christie, Elizabeth Christie, Christie, Song moksuniw , Elizabeth ising, Song Congcian moksuniw , Elizabeth , Song Eli , o cecay nai Glasgow, Scotland a ising. Halafin cingra i timolay Taywan a malaising ato singkiwsi a tayal. Kasofocan 'Ayaway 'orip O kasofocan ni Song Elizabeth (Elizabeth Blackburn Christie) i Glasgow no Scotland. O mama ningra ci John Christie, o nao padamaay to ising, ikor mala nisilsilay to sapaiyo; o ina ningra ci Anne Margaret McAra Soutar; o sakakaay a wawa to fafahiyan ci Elizabeth, tatolo ko safa to fa'inayan, ikor nangra saheto o malaisingay. I kaemangan limaay ho komihecaan ni Christie misitapangay to mafana' to tilid a misa'osi. I 19 ko miheca i, micomoday to isingan minanam to 5 miheca. 24 ko mihecaan i, misawad maala ningra ko toloay (laloma'ay, papotalay, sapaiyo) kasasiiked no isingan a fana' (sakamoko' han ko tilid, L.R.C.P. & S., Ed.). I 1891 miheca, tayni Taywan ci Christie i minanam to sowal no Taywan; ikor, masaso'araw cingra aci Song Congcian itira i Hongkong 1892 miheca 1 folad 9 romi'ad mararamod . Isingan a tayal. Ikor no kararamod, midefong cangra mararamod to isingan ato pisinting a tayal i Taynan saniyaro' ko pidotocan. I 1893 miheca 6 folad 4 romi'ad, masofoc cingra i Ryukyuyu to wawa to fafahiyan, paka ci Hazel Lombay Ferguson han ko pangangan. I 1894 miheca 10 folad 11 romi'ad, masofoc cingra to saka 2 a wawa fa'inayan ci Ian Grant Ferguson, ikor mitahidang cangra to midipotay to wawa a ina, padoedo tayra i kasaniyaro' ko isingan no pisinting a tayal. Itiyaay ho, o satadamaanay a fafahiyan isingan cingra, 'aloman ko niyaro'ay a fafahiyan mananam to pinengneng paising ningra; nika, o sapinengneng ningra saheto nai kiwkayay a sacoker a caay pali'acaen ko pipaising ano eca padafohay. I 1896 miheca, madenga cingra to mangalefay salifong adada, saka malahakelong to fa'inay minokay i niyaro' paising, saan masofoc t Osaka 3 wawa to fa'inayan ci Graeme Douglas Ferguson. I 1898 miheca, malahakelong haca ato wawa a tayni i Taywan. Naitiya, misarocod to ko tayal ningra to isingan a demak, masaromi'ad salafii ko picada to adadaay ato pasofocay ina, nanoyaan mararid ko pisaliway to kaen; itiya i, o Inkiris fafahiyan sinkiwsi yofayof to mihecaan padamso to payso sapadang to 'aca no sapaiyo cingraan, misahalaka mikilim to payso patado sapipatireng to no fafahiyan a isingan . Mapatay I 1900 miheca 12 folad, ira ko cecay o tatayra i Muca (Neimen no Takao) malaliyaw haca ko kadengaan no adada. Minokay tayni i Taynan fosya i, caay ka nga'ay k okakomaen a maota'ay, tadacaay to ko tatirengan a malotay. Ikor, pakayni pinengneng no ising ci An ising no Sinlaw isingan ato ni Tsukuyama Kuichi ising i, hato caay ka fangcal a manga'ay. I 1901 miheca 1 folad 17 romi'ad, itira i Sinlaw isingan mapatay cingra, 33 ko mihecaan itini hekal. I 1 folad 19 romi'ad, o polong no Sinlaw isingan ato Ciwlokiw congsie pitilidan mipadongos a lihay i cingraan, ikor matadem i Taynan fosya Gongchenmen a mitadem; toya romi'ad, o 'alomanay finawlan miraod tayra mita'ong padongos tangoor cingraan . Ikoray demak Maherek mitadem to fafahi ningra ci Song Congcian foksi i, panokayen ningra i mato'asay no fafahi ko wawa mapolong saka, manga'ay padoedo matayal to pisinting i Taywan . Piheratengan I 2015 miheca, paherek ko patireng to Madou Sinlaw isingan i, laloma' no isingan a pilihayan mapangangan to "Piheratengan ci Song Elizabeth ising a pilihayan" . Pinengnengan to tilid 2. . www.laijohn.com. (2017-10-25). (原始內容存檔於2017-10-25).
S.PHON: == so~uŋ əɾi*ab~b~vətħ isiŋ == so~uŋ əɾi*ab~b~vətħ isiŋ (inkiris: əɾi*ab~b~vətħ b~b~vɾaʦkb~b~vo~u~urn fər*o~u~uso~un, **** miħəʦa, * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ-**** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ ), ro~uma əɾi*ab~b~vətħ b~b~vɾaʦkb~b~vo~u~urn ʦħristiə, əɾi*ab~b~vətħ ʦħristiə, ʦħristiə, so~uŋ mo~ukso~u~uniw , əɾi*ab~b~vətħ isiŋ, so~uŋ ʦo~uŋʦian mo~ukso~u~uniw , əɾi*ab~b~vətħ , so~uŋ əɾi , o~u ʦəʦaj nai *ɾas*o~uw, sʦo~utɾanɬ~ɮ a isiŋ. ħaɾafin ʦiŋra i timo~uɾaj tajwan a maɾaisiŋ ato~u siŋkiwsi a tajaɾ. kaso~ufo~uʦan ʡajawaj ʡo~urip o~u kaso~ufo~uʦan ni so~uŋ əɾi*ab~b~vətħ (əɾi*ab~b~vətħ b~b~vɾaʦkb~b~vo~u~urn ʦħristiə) i *ɾas*o~uw no~u sʦo~utɾanɬ~ɮ. o~u mama niŋra ʦi *o~uħn ʦħristiə, o~u nao~u paɬ~ɮamaaj to~u isiŋ, iko~ur maɾa nisiɾsiɾaj to~u sapaijo~u; o~u ina niŋra ʦi annə mar*arət mʦara so~uo~u~utar; o~u sakakaaj a wawa to~u fafaħijan ʦi əɾi*ab~b~vətħ, tato~uɾo~u ko~u safa to~u faʡinajan, iko~ur naŋra saħəto~u o~u maɾaisiŋaj. i kaəmaŋan ɾimaaj ħo~u ko~umiħəʦaan ni ʦħristiə misitapaŋaj to~u mafanaʡ to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ a misaʡo~usi. i ** ko~u miħəʦa i, miʦo~umo~uɬ~ɮaj to~u isiŋan minanam to~u * miħəʦa. ** ko~u miħəʦaan i, misawaɬ~ɮ maaɾa niŋra ko~u to~uɾo~uaj (ɾaɾo~umaʡaj, papo~utaɾaj, sapaijo~u) kasasiikəɬ~ɮ no~u isiŋan a fanaʡ (sakamo~uko~uʡ ħan ko~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ, ɾ.r.ʦ.p. & s., əɬ~ɮ.). i **** miħəʦa, tajni tajwan ʦi ʦħristiə i minanam to~u so~uwaɾ no~u tajwan; iko~ur, masaso~uʡaraw ʦiŋra aʦi so~uŋ ʦo~uŋʦian itira i ħo~uŋko~uŋ **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ mararamo~uɬ~ɮ . isiŋan a tajaɾ. iko~ur no~u kararamo~uɬ~ɮ, miɬ~ɮəfo~uŋ ʦaŋra mararamo~uɬ~ɮ to~u isiŋan ato~u pisintiŋ a tajaɾ i tajnan sanijaro~uʡ ko~u piɬ~ɮo~uto~uʦan. i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ * ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, maso~ufo~uʦ ʦiŋra i rjo~u~ukjo~u~ujo~u~u to~u wawa to~u fafaħijan, paka ʦi ħa*əɾ ɾo~umb~b~vaj fər*o~u~uso~un ħan ko~u paŋaŋan. i **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, maso~ufo~uʦ ʦiŋra to~u saka * a wawa faʡinajan ʦi ian *rant fər*o~u~uso~un, iko~ur mitaħiɬ~ɮaŋ ʦaŋra to~u miɬ~ɮipo~utaj to~u wawa a ina, paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u tajra i kasanijaro~uʡ ko~u isiŋan no~u pisintiŋ a tajaɾ. itijaaj ħo~u, o~u sataɬ~ɮamaanaj a fafaħijan isiŋan ʦiŋra, ʡaɾo~uman ko~u nijaro~uʡaj a fafaħijan mananam to~u pinəŋnəŋ paisiŋ niŋra; nika, o~u sapinəŋnəŋ niŋra saħəto~u nai kiwkajaj a saʦo~ukər a ʦaaj paɾiʡaʦaən ko~u pipaisiŋ ano~u əʦa paɬ~ɮafo~uħaj. i **** miħəʦa, maɬ~ɮəŋa ʦiŋra to~u maŋaɾəfaj saɾifo~uŋ aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa, saka maɾaħakəɾo~uŋ to~u faʡinaj mino~ukaj i nijaro~uʡ paisiŋ, saan maso~ufo~uʦ t o~usaka * wawa to~u faʡinajan ʦi *raəmə ɬ~ɮo~uo~u~u*ɾas fər*o~u~uso~un. i **** miħəʦa, maɾaħakəɾo~uŋ ħaʦa ato~u wawa a tajni i tajwan. naitija, misaro~uʦo~uɬ~ɮ to~u ko~u tajaɾ niŋra to~u isiŋan a ɬ~ɮəmak, masaro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ saɾafii ko~u piʦaɬ~ɮa to~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮaaj ato~u paso~ufo~uʦaj ina, nano~ujaan marariɬ~ɮ ko~u pisaɾiwaj to~u kaən; itija i, o~u inkiris fafaħijan sinkiwsi jo~ufajo~uf to~u miħəʦaan paɬ~ɮamso~u to~u pajso~u sapaɬ~ɮaŋ to~u ʡaʦa no~u sapaijo~u ʦiŋraan, misaħaɾaka mikiɾim to~u pajso~u pataɬ~ɮo~u sapipatirəŋ to~u no~u fafaħijan a isiŋan . mapataj i **** miħəʦa ** fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ, ira ko~u ʦəʦaj o~u tatajra i mo~u~uʦa (nəimən no~u takao~u) maɾaɾijaw ħaʦa ko~u kaɬ~ɮəŋaan no~u aɬ~ɮaɬ~ɮa. mino~ukaj tajni i tajnan fo~usja i, ʦaaj ka ŋaʡaj k o~ukako~umaən a mao~utaʡaj, taɬ~ɮaʦaaj to~u ko~u tatirəŋan a maɾo~utaj. iko~ur, pakajni pinəŋnəŋ no~u isiŋ ʦi an isiŋ no~u sinɾaw isiŋan ato~u ni tso~u~uko~u~ujama ko~u~uiʦħi isiŋ i, ħato~u ʦaaj ka faŋʦaɾ a maŋaʡaj. i **** miħəʦa * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, itira i sinɾaw isiŋan mapataj ʦiŋra, ** ko~u miħəʦaan itini ħəkaɾ. i * fo~uɾaɬ~ɮ ** ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, o~u po~uɾo~uŋ no~u sinɾaw isiŋan ato~u ʦiwɾo~ukiw ʦo~uŋsiə pitiɾiɬ~ɮan mipaɬ~ɮo~uŋo~us a ɾiħaj i ʦiŋraan, iko~ur mataɬ~ɮəm i tajnan fo~usja *o~uŋʦħənmən a mitaɬ~ɮəm; to~uja ro~umiʡaɬ~ɮ, o~u ʡaɾo~umanaj finawɾan mirao~uɬ~ɮ tajra mitaʡo~uŋ paɬ~ɮo~uŋo~us taŋo~uo~ur ʦiŋraan . iko~uraj ɬ~ɮəmak maħərək mitaɬ~ɮəm to~u fafaħi niŋra ʦi so~uŋ ʦo~uŋʦian fo~uksi i, pano~ukajən niŋra i mato~uʡasaj no~u fafaħi ko~u wawa mapo~uɾo~uŋ saka, maŋaʡaj paɬ~ɮo~uəɬ~ɮo~u matajaɾ to~u pisintiŋ i tajwan . piħəratəŋan i **** miħəʦa, paħərək ko~u patirəŋ to~u maɬ~ɮo~uo~u~u sinɾaw isiŋan i, ɾaɾo~umaʡ no~u isiŋan a piɾiħajan mapaŋaŋan to~u "piħəratəŋan ʦi so~uŋ əɾi*ab~b~vətħ isiŋ a piɾiħajan" . pinəŋnəŋan to~u tiɾiɬ~ɮ *. . www.ɾaijo~uħn.ʦo~um. (****-**-**). (***********-**-**).
